## Editing.EditorContext.copyTo() method

Copy entity to another collection. This method must be overridden by derived classes that need copy functionality.

**Signature:**

```typescript
copyTo(id: TId, targetCollectionId: SourceId): Result<TId>;
```

</td><td>
